business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction - healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

positives: 42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Formal safety program is in place
Formal written safety program is in place
Formal return-to-work or modified duty program is in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Four of five listed locations are sprinklered
concerns: Hazardous materials are used or encountered in operations
Certificates of insurance are not required from all subcontractors before work begins
Written contracts are not in place with all subcontractors
40% of work is performed by subcontractors
Hold-harmless agreements are not obtained from all subcontractors
Applicant performs demolition or blasting operations
One warehouse location is not sprinklered
Prior insurance history shows relatively high claim counts and a 2022 cancellation
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 13 claims in 2024 with Nationwide Insurance, 10 claims in 2023 with Berkshire Hathaway Guard, and 4 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. The 2022 policy reflects a cancellation.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction - healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. Three largest projects completed in the past 3 years: 1200000 restaurant build-out, 800000 medical office renovation, 650000 church addition.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Formal written safety program: Yes. Return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits: Yes. Certificates of insurance required from all subcontractors before work begins: No. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors: No.
